Localization.Description: Attempt to add a ZooKeeper subcluster to a cluster

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} added a ZooKeeper subcluster to a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is adding a ZooKeeper subcluster to a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to add a ZooKeeper subcluster to a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
